definition: Global capital flows are bifurcating into three blocs (US/EU-allied, China-centric, non-aligned EM), making 'global stock-bond correlation' an increasingly meaningless aggregate concept.
evidence: Chinese reserve management shifting to gold, EM bonds, bilateral swaps
Non-aligned EM maintaining independent monetary cycles
Capital flow patterns increasingly determined by geopolitical alignment
open_questions: How does bloc bifurcation affect traditional cross-asset correlation frameworks?
At what pace is the bifurcation progressing?
Which countries are genuinely non-aligned vs. leaning?
